text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Kikuka Sho, Agnes Tachyon confesses
to me that her legs might one day prevent her
from being able to run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can't reach the limits of Umamusume
potential with her own legs, she would have no
choice but to entrust said pursuit to another
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, my own determination bolsters her
resolve, motivating her to fulfill her dream with
her own two legs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After realizing she's been fighting a battle alone
this whole time, I promise to do everything in my
power to help her. Thus...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our days in pursuit of Umamusume potential
begin once again. First up is a G1 race—the
Osaka Hai.
